summary: v1.0 LAUNCH QA regression complete. Backend 5/5 tests pass (root, health, stats, session create+persist+stats-increment, validation). Frontend smoke covered: Setup validation (empty/short/duplicate-case-insensitive), L1 Q1 render with timer ring + Skips 3/3, tap option A -> auto-lock -> manual Pass Device button, mobile responsive at 390x844 and 360x640 with NO horizontal scroll and Begin CTA visible without scroll. Placeholder audit clean — only intentional 'Coming Soon' L3 teaser remains; no Lorem/TODO/Mock Data/Sample Data/Demo. Full L1->L2->Insights e2e flow already verified green in iteration_2 (same code, no regressions detected).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py GET /api/sessions/{id} returns 200 with null body for missing sessions instead of 404 — non-blocking carry-over from earlier iterations; safe for v1.0 since frontend does not consume this endpoint.

Setup.jsx >20 char validation is effectively gated by input maxLength=20 on the field, so the explicit length-error branch (line 20) is currently unreachable from UI; behavior is still correct (cannot exceed 20).

gameStore L1_ANSWER: minor defensive hardening recommended — no-op if questionIndex >= LEVEL_1_QUESTIONS.length to prevent any double-dispatch from a final timer tick (carry-over note, no repro observed).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on launch QA smoke items executed

seed_data_creation: TEST_Alice/TEST_Bob session created by backend pytest (auto-cleanup not implemented; benign test data persists in Mongo).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Setup testids: setup-player1-input, setup-player2-input, setup-start-btn, setup-error. Landing CTA: home-start-btn. L1: l1-option-a, l1-option-b, l1-skip-btn (shows 'Skips 3/3'). L1-locked is manual (Pass Device); l1-both auto-advances. Q15 crash already fixed (iteration_2). Edge-scenario archetype/story permutations (A/B/C/D/E) and L1 hint/exit modal were NOT re-executed in iteration_3 — relying on iteration_2 e2e pass since gameStore/Insights code is unchanged. Backend BASE_URL pulled from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
rca_of_the_issue: No new bugs. Previous Q15 out-of-bounds crash fix (Level1Question.jsx bounds-check on q before render & in timer effect) confirmed still in place and stable.
